title: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Exam Highlights

detail.title: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Exam Highlights
detail.short_info: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Engineering exam is held in two shifts today. Check live updates on question paper difficulty, student reactions, answer key and marks.

content.text: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Engineering (MPC) exam is being held today in two shifts from 9 am to 12 pm and 2 pm to 5 pm, and memory‑based question papers, answer keys and detailed analysis will be released after the exam.

The AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 exam is the second day of the Engineering (MPC) schedule, conducted in computer‑based mode for B.Tech and related engineering admissions in Andhra Pradesh. The exam is organised by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada, on behalf of the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE).

rows: Andhra Pradesh Engineering, Agriculture & Pharmacy Common Entrance Test (AP EAPCET / AP EAMCET) 2026
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University (JNTU), Kakinada on behalf of APSCHE
Shift 1: 9:00 am-12:00 pm; Shift 2: 2:00 pm-5:00 pm
+1 mark for each correct answer, no negative marking

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Exam Timing and Schedule

content.text: The May 13 Engineering exam is being conducted in two sessions. Candidates must strictly follow the reporting and gate‑closing timings mentioned on the hall ticket, as late entry is not usually allowed once the exam starts.
Reaching the centre at least two hours before the exam helps candidates complete security screening, document verification and biometric verification without rush.

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Question Paper Pattern (Engineering - MPC)

content.text: The AP EAMCET 2026 Engineering paper pattern is common for all exam days, including May 13. The test assesses candidates in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics through multiple‑choice questions.

The duration of the exam is 3 hours, the mode is CBT, and the question paper is generally bilingual (English and Telugu). There is no negative marking, and each correct answer carries one mark, which encourages students to attempt maximum questions.

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Unofficial Answer Key

content.text: Unofficial answer keys for AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 are likely to be released on the same day by prominent coaching institutes and online platforms. These keys provide probable correct options for the memory‑based questions and allow students to quickly estimate their expected scores.
Candidates should remember that unofficial keys may contain minor discrepancies and should treat them as provisional references until the official key is released.
AP EAMCET 2026 Official Answer Key Release

The official AP EAMCET 2026 answer key, shift‑wise question papers and response sheets for all exam dates, including May 13, will be released on the AP EAPCET official website after the completion of the exam schedule. The authorities will first publish the preliminary answer key, along with a notification specifying the objection window.

Candidates can log in, download the question paper and answer key for their date and shift, calculate their probable marks, and raise objections against any answer they believe is incorrect. After evaluating all objections, the final answer key is released, and the result is prepared based on this final version.

sections.heading: How to Download AP EAMCET 2026 Question Paper, Answer Key and Response Sheet

content.text: How to Download AP EAMCET 2026 Question Paper

items: Visit the official AP EAPCET website: cets.apsche.ap.gov.in/EAPCET/Eapcet/.
Navigate to the “Question Papers” or “Master Question Papers” section for AP EAMCET 2026 Engineering.
Select the exam date “May 13, 2026” and choose Shift 1 or Shift 2 as applicable.
Download the question paper PDF for review and practice.

content.text: How to Download AP EAMCET 2026 Answer Key

items: Go to the AP EAPCET official portal.
Click on the link for “Exam Papers and Preliminary Key” or “Answer Key” for AP EAMCET 2026.
Choose the Engineering stream and select the May 13, 2026 exam date and shift.
Download the answer key PDF and use it to check the correct options.

content.text: How to Download AP EAMCET 2026 Response Sheet

items: On the same website, open the “Response Sheet” link for AP EAMCET 2026.
Enter your registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth, as mentioned in the instructions.
View and download your personal response sheet and compare it with the answer key to calculate your estimated score.

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 Exam Day Guidelines for May 13

content.text: Candidates appearing for the May 13 exam must follow all exam‑day instructions specified in the information bulletin and on the hall ticket. Reaching the centre well before the reporting time is essential to ensure smooth completion of verification processes.
Key guidelines include:

items: Carry a printed copy of your AP EAMCET 2026 hall ticket, a valid photo ID proof (such as Aadhaar card, voter ID, passport or driving licence), and other documents mentioned for your category.
Do not bring prohibited items such as mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, electronic gadgets, books, notes, or bags into the exam hall.
Biometric verification, including fingerprint and photograph, may be conducted before you enter the exam room.
The exam will be conducted in CBT mode, and you should familiarise yourself with the on‑screen navigation, timer and question palette.
Follow any dress code instructions such as avoiding heavy jewellery, caps, jackets or outfits with too many pockets, and opting for simple, comfortable clothing and footwear.

content.text: AP EAMCET 2026 eligibility is primarily based on educational qualification, age criteria and subject combination. For the Engineering stream, candidates are usually required to have passed or be appearing in Class 12 (Intermediate) with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry from a recognised board.

There are also course‑specific requirements and conditions, such as minimum qualifying marks and age limits, which are detailed in the official AP EAPCET notification. Aspirants from outside Andhra Pradesh and Telangana can also apply, subject to specific rules on local/non‑local status and reservation benefits.

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 Important Dates (Including May 13 Exam)

content.text: AP EAMCET 2026 is spread across multiple days for Engineering and Agriculture & Pharmacy streams. The May 13 exam falls within the Engineering schedule.

rows: AP EAMCET 2026 Agriculture & Pharmacy exam dates

content.text: Candidates should regularly visit the official website for any updates or changes in the schedule.

sections.heading: AP EAMCET 2026 May 13 Exam: Tips for Upcoming Shifts and Remaining Days

content.text: For candidates whose exam is scheduled in later shifts or on upcoming days, the May 13 and earlier papers offer valuable insight. Analysing memory‑based questions helps understand the balance between theory and numericals, as well as topic weightage.
Focus on:

items: Revising high‑weightage chapters in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry, especially those that frequently appear in AP EAMCET.
Solving previous year papers and the latest memory‑based questions from May 12 and May 13 to get comfortable with the current pattern and difficulty.
Taking full‑length mock tests in CBT mode to improve speed, accuracy and time management, and to build exam‑day confidence.
